candidates.why: Represents core top-line sales; excludes other income which is shown separately and then summed into 'Total Revenue'. For PROF, pure operating revenue is preferred.
'Total Revenue' includes both Revenue and Other income; less precise as a pure sales measure than the 'Revenue' line.

variables.notes: Selected base 'Revenue' line as the primary sales figure, excluding other income.

candidates.why: Income statement production-related cost line; directly tied to revenue and represents cost of goods sold for this business.
Balance sheet inventory component, not a period expense; inappropriate as COGS.

variables.notes: Cost of Materials is the clear COGS proxy.

candidates.why: Typical SG&A personnel/overhead cost; not marked as COGS or depreciation.
Operating overhead bucket; not labeled as COGS or a total; fits SG&A definition.
Additional operating expense bucket; likely SG&A-type overhead; distinct from COGS and D&A.
Explicit general and administrative expenses, core SG&A component.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total; using all listed overhead components as SG&A components per instructions.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line, even if supplemental; matches XRD definition.
Primary income-statement interest expense line, including various borrowings; best match for total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities only; subset of total interest expense.
Represents profit attribution, not interest; not suitable as XINT.
Appears to be a placeholder/empty; main populated interest line is 'Interest Expenses'.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; not the total interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period expense.
Equity attributable to minorities, not interest expense.
Equity attributable to minorities, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value equity conversion option
candidates.why: Income statement fair value change, not a stock of equity; unsuitable for BE.
Equity-accounted earnings, not the equity balance itself.
Represents parent shareholders' equity only; excludes non-controlling interests; acceptable but less comprehensive than Total equity for BE including minorities.
Component of equity, not total equity.
Explicit total equity including non-controlling interests; best match for book equity (BE).

variables.notes: Using consolidated Total equity including non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Represents minority interest share of profit in the period; income statement flow, not balance, but still identifies minorities. However, balance sheet lines better match MIB definition.
Balance sheet line for equity attributable to non-controlling (minority) interests; directly matches MIB definition.
Alternative label for the same minority equity; appears duplicated; either would work but one is sufficient.

variables.notes: Chose the Balance Sheet non-controlling interests line as the minority interest (MIB) balance.
